title: Bonds Fall as Traders Boost Fed-Hike Bets on PPI: Markets Wrap
summary: A resurgence in inflation sent bonds lower and stocks wavered on speculation the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer as the war in Iran boosts energy costs.

title: Wells Fargo Markets Investment-Grade Bond Sale in Three Parts
summary: Wells Fargo & Co. is offering investment-grade bonds in as many as three parts, a month after the bank reported weaker-than-expected results for the first quarter.

title: Bharti to Raise Airtel Africa Stake in $2.9 Billion Stock Swap
summary: Bharti Airtel Ltd. approved a plan to bolster its stake in its UK-listed African subsidiary through a $2.9 billion stock swap, a move which India’s No. 2 wireless operator expects will boost earnings per share.

title: North Sea Oil Fetches Discount for First Time During Iran War
summary: A North Sea oil grade that’s central to setting the world’s most important physical crude price traded at a discount for the first time during the Iran war, as immediate fears ease of a supply shock in Europe.

title: Equinox Gold Agrees to Buy Orla Mining in $5.1 Billion Deal
summary: Equinox Gold Corp. agreed to acquire Orla Mining Ltd. in a cash-and-stock deal valuing the Canadian miner at about $5.1 billion, the latest in a wave of mining deals as producers seek to grow output after a massive price rally in bullion over the past year.

title: Stock Futures Signal Rebound as Dip Buyers Snap Up Tech Shares
summary: US equity futures pushed higher early Wednesday as traders snapped up technology shares after a pullback in the group, with enthusiasm around strong earnings outweighing a resurgence in inflation.

title: Nvidia, Tesla Shares Advance as CEOs Join Trump’s Trip to China
summary: An upcoming meeting between US President Donald Trump and his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping could be the next test for stocks that are clocking one record after the next.

title: Morgan Stanley Hikes S&P 500 Target to 8,300 on Earnings Boom
summary: Morgan Stanley is turning more positive on US stocks in a bet that blockbuster earnings and a strong economy will keep the bull market running full steam ahead.

title: Deutsche Bank, Santander Test World Bank’s Risk Transfer Engine
summary: Deutsche Bank AG and Banco Santander SA are among financial institutions participating in a milestone synthetic securitization designed to help the World Bank Group leverage its ability to provide loans to emerging-market borrowers.

title: Datacentres using 6% of electricity supply in UK and US, research says
summary:
Industry body says energy consumption driven by AI up 15% globally in two years as it warns of societal backlash

Datacentres are consuming 6% of electricity in the UK and US, with the growing strain of AI on energy supplies prompting community resistance, according to research.

summary:
Invitation to be part of group including Elon Musk and Tim Cook highlights American AI and tech ambitions

The billionaire chief executive of the chipmaker Nvidia, Jensen Huang, has joined Donald Trump’s China delegation after a reported last-minute invitation, highlighting the US’s AI and tech ambitions.

summary:
